name: ✰ andrew graves
description:
🚬 | interrupted in the heat of the moment

and then you heard it, the sound of the front door opening, and ashley’s voice calling for andrew. your eyes widened at the sound, the colour draining out your face as you seemed to have fucking jinxed it.

“andrew- fuck, she’s here!” you hissed, the pleasure you felt previously suddenly subsiding. you slapped his shoulder as he seemed to have been too caught up in the moment, his movements not seizing as he hadn’t heard the door opening nor the sound of his “beloved” sister’s voice.

“fucking what?”
